caption: The video captures a professional interview taking place at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The man on the left, who appears to be the interviewer, is actively speaking and gesturing with his hands, emphasizing his points. He holds a pen in one hand, suggesting he might be taking notes or referring to them during the conversation. The man on the right, presumably the interviewee, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. In the background, other attendees can be seen walking and engaging in conversations, indicating a bustling conference environment. The setting is well-lit, with large windows allowing natural light to complement the indoor lighting. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal yet dynamic discussion centered around MongoDB-related topics.
